top_signals.title: US Bonds Rally as Traders Trim Fed Rate-Hike Bets on Iran Deal
top_signals.summary: Treasuries advanced as investors dialed back expectations for Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes following news of a deal to halt the Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: French army shows Leclerc tank with once-mocked anti-drone cage
top_signals.summary: Once derided as primitive, roof-mounted armor variants have been adopted by both Russian and Ukrainian forces as drone threats proliferate.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Shares Jump in Second Day of Trading After Record IPO
top_signals.summary: SpaceX shares jumped in their second day of trading, adding to gains following a blockbuster debut that instantly vaulted it into the ranks of the world’s most valuable public companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Kraken launches crypto perps trading in the US on Kraken Pro
top_signals.summary: Kraken completed its acquisition of the fully CFTC-licensed exchange, clearinghouse, and brokerage Bitnomial in May.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: How to Beat an Autocrat
top_signals.summary: The real lessons of Orban’s defeat.
